2605.01733.title: GEASS: Training-Free Caption Steering for Hallucination Mitigation in Vision-Language Models
2605.01733.paper_summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) excel at grounded reasoning but remain prone to object hallucination. Recent work treats self-generated captions as a uniformly positive resource, yet we find that naively embedding one can degrade rather than help--dropping Qwen2.5-VL-3B accuracy on HallusionBench by nearly 10 points. Two structural properties explain this. First, captions anchor not only the model's final answer but also its reasoning trajectory and lexical choices. Second, caption errors are asymmetric: omissions vastly outnumber fabrications, yet each fabrication carries a much larger per-instance impact. A caption's usefulness is therefore a per-query property, not a per-corpus one. We propose GEASS (Gated Evidence-Aware Selective Steering), a training-free module that decides on each query how much of the caption the model consumes: it gates the caption by the clean path's confidence, weights it by the entropy reduction it produces, and raises the evidence bar when the two pathways disagree. Experiments on POPE and HallusionBench across four VLMs show that GEASS consistently improves over vanilla inference and contrastive decoding, with only two extra forward passes per query.
2605.01733.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言模型（VLMs）在基於實證的推理方面表現優異，但仍然容易出現物體幻覺。最近的研究將自生成的標題視為一個統一的正面資源，然而我們發現，天真地嵌入一個標題可能會導致性能下降，而不是幫助——在 HallusionBench 上，Qwen2.5-VL-3B 的準確率下降了近 10 分。兩個結構特性解釋了這一現象。首先，標題不僅固定了模型的最終答案，還影響了其推理過程和詞彙選擇。其次，標題錯誤是非對稱的：遺漏的情況遠遠超過虛構的情況，但每一次虛構對每個實例的影響卻要大得多。因此，標題的有用性是一個每個查詢的特性，而不是一個每個語料庫的特性。我們提出了 GEASS（門控證據感知選擇性引導），這是一個無需訓練的模塊，決定在每個查詢中模型消耗多少標題：它根據乾淨路徑的信心來門控標題，根據它所產生的熵減少來加權，並在兩條路徑不一致時提高證據門檻。在四個 VLM 上對 POPE 和 HallusionBench 的實驗顯示，GEASS 始終在普通推理和對比解碼上有所改進，每個查詢僅需額外進行兩次前向傳播。
2605.01733.author: Zeshang Li et.al.
2605.01733.authors: Zeshang Li, Shuoyang Zhang, Jiashen Ding
